_comment: Tier-2 for kratos mpm#: catalog listed element names UpdatedLagrangianPQ2D / UpdatedLagrangianPQ2D4N / UpdatedLagrangianPQ3D8N / UpdatedLagrangianAxisym — none are registered. Real KratosMPMApplication names have the 'MPM' prefix: MPMUpdatedLagrangian{2D3N,2D4N,3D4N,3D8N}, MPMUpdatedLagrangianAxisymmetry{2D3N,2D4N}, MPMUpdatedLagrangianPQ, MPMUpdatedLagrangianUP, etc. Verified empirically 2026-06-01.
